{"action":"opened","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27362","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27362/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27362/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/issues/27362/events","html_url":"https://github.com/numpy/numpy/issues/27362","id":2513352931,"node_id":"I_kwDOAA3dP86Vzrjj","number":27362,"title":"BUG: np.linalg.inv version 1.26.4 causes high CPU load of an otherwise idle process","user":{"login":"holesond","id":6507466,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjY1MDc0NjY=","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/6507466?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/holesond","html_url":"https://github.com/holesond","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/holesond/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/holesond/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/holesond/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/holesond/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/holesond/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/holesond/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/holesond/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/holesond/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/holesond/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"labels":[{"id":6359214,"node_id":"MDU6TGFiZWw2MzU5MjE0","url":"https://api.github.com/repos/numpy/numpy/labels/00%20-%20Bug","name":"00 - Bug","color":"fef2c0","default":false,"description":null}],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-09-09T08:56:20Z","updated_at":"2024-09-09T08:56:20Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"NONE","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"### Describe the issue:

In Numpy version 1.26.4 and earlier (tested 1.26.2, 1.25.2), calling np.linalg.inv on a small (4x4, 3x3) matrix (even identity matrix) just 10x per second causes a very high (70%) CPU load of the python process running the example code.

The example code prints something like this

```
sleep_duration: 0.09980 seconds
sleep_duration: 0.09982 seconds
sleep_duration: 0.09982 seconds
sleep_duration: 0.09983 seconds
sleep_duration: 0.09989 seconds
sleep_duration: 0.09988 seconds
```

which means that the matrix inversion operation itself is fairly fast (usually below 200 us runtime) and that the code spends the rest (99.8%) of each 0.1 second long period in time.sleep (idle).

When I run the example code with `export OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1`, the CPU load of the python process stays below 1%. I think that this should ideally happen even with the OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS environment variable not set.

Upgrading Numpy to 2.1.1 fixes this issue even when OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1 is not set.

Maybe a related issue is #8120.


### Reproduce the code example:

```python
import time

import numpy as np



def main():
    loop_period_seconds = 0.1
    mat = np.eye(4)
    while True:
        t_0 = time.time()
        mat_inv = np.linalg.inv(mat)
        t_1 = time.time()
        sleep_duration = max(0.0, loop_period_seconds - (t_1-t_0))
        print(f"sleep_duration: {sleep_duration:.5f} seconds")
        time.sleep(sleep_duration)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```


### Error message:

_No response_

### Python and NumPy Versions:

Ubuntu 22.04.4
Python 3.10.12
Numpy 1.26.4 (the same issue is also in 1.26.2 and 1.25.2)


### Runtime Environment:

Numpy 1.26.4:
```

[{'numpy_version': '1.26.4',
  'python': '3.10.12 (main, Jul 29 2024, 16:56:48) [GCC 11.4.0]',
  'uname': uname_result(system='Linux', node='acera', release='6.8.0-40-generic', version='#40~22.04.3-Ubuntu SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Tue Jul 30 17:30:19 UTC 2', machine='x86_64')},
 {'simd_extensions': {'baseline': ['SSE', 'SSE2', 'SSE3'],
                      'found': ['SSSE3',
                                'SSE41',
                                'POPCNT',
                                'SSE42',
                                'AVX',
                                'F16C',
                                'FMA3',
                                'AVX2'],
                      'not_found': ['AVX512F',
                                    'AVX512CD',
                                    'AVX512_KNL',
                                    'AVX512_KNM',
                                    'AVX512_SKX',
                                    'AVX512_CLX',
                                    'AVX512_CNL',
                                    'AVX512_ICL']}},
 {'architecture': 'Haswell',
  'filepath': '/home/ondrej/.local/lib/python3.10/site-packages/numpy.libs/libopenblas64_p-r0-0cf96a72.3.23.dev.so',
  'internal_api': 'openblas',
  'num_threads': 4,
  'prefix': 'libopenblas',
  'threading_layer': 'pthreads',
  'user_api': 'blas',
  'version': '0.3.23.dev'}]
```

```

  'uname': uname_result(system='Linux', node='acera', release='6.8.0-40-generic', version='#40~22.04.3-Ubuntu SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Tue Jul 30 17:30:19 UTC 2', machine='x86_64')},
 {'simd_extensions': {'baseline': ['SSE', 'SSE2', 'SSE3'],
                      'found': ['SSSE3',
                                'SSE41',

                                'SSE42',
```
